---
title: "Facture"
format: typst
params:
  numero: ""
  date_facture: ""
  entreprise_nom: ""
  entreprise_adresse: ""
  entreprise_tel: ""
  entreprise_mail: ""
  client: ""
  adresse_client: ""
  telephone_client: ""
  description: ""
  montant: 0
  inclure_taxes: true
  numero_tps: ""
  numero_tvq: ""
  tps: 0
  tvq: 0
  taxes: 0
  total: 0
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

format_argent <- function(x) {
  paste0(
    format(round(x, 2), decimal.mark = ",", big.mark = " ", nsmall = 2),
    " $"
  )
}
```

# FACTURE

**Numéro :** `r params$numero`  
**Date :** `r params$date_facture`

## Entreprise

**`r params$entreprise_nom`**  
`r params$entreprise_adresse`  
`r params$entreprise_tel`  
`r params$entreprise_mail`

## Vendu à

**`r params$client`**  
`r params$adresse_client`  
`r params$telephone_client`

## Description du service

| Description | Montant |
|---|---:|
| `r params$description` | `r format_argent(params$montant)` |

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

if (params$inclure_taxes) {
  cat("
## Taxes

| Taxe | Numéro | Taux | Montant |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| TPS | ", params$numero_tps, " | 5 % | ", format_argent(params$tps), " |
| TVQ | ", params$numero_tvq, " | 9,975 % | ", format_argent(params$tvq), " |

## Total

| Élément | Montant |
|---|---:|
| Sous-total | ", format_argent(params$montant), " |
| Taxes | ", format_argent(params$taxes), " |
| **Montant total** | **", format_argent(params$total), "** |
")
} else {
  cat("
## Total

| Élément | Montant |
|---|---:|
| **Montant total** | **", format_argent(params$total), "** |
")
}
```
